nodes.label: Potential Sources of Incremental Equity Capital
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-06-17 151937_冰冰小美_到底是什么力量推动了这一轮的上涨。1，gjd？汇金等已经退出一部分资金。2，私募基金？私募基金在整改。3，公募基金？公募.md
author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Insurance liquidity, foreign capital, a shift from bonds, leverage, and returning hedging capital are considered possible contributors to market strength, while the ultimate source remains uncertain.
